raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX a dispute was approved for {$83.00} and a letter was provided by Macys/ American express credit card. however this money was never refunded or adjusted to my account because they failed to add this credit on time. Letter states " {$83.00} dispute amount - XX/XX/XXXX We issued a credit for the above amount ( s ), as well as any associated adjustments to fees and interest charges. These will appear on your statement within XXXX billing cycles. 
We now consider this matter resolved and have completed our investigation. Any amount placed in dispute status has been removed. '' However they never refunded this amount. I have been calling them since XXXX to get this fix ; but their customer service personnel kept me on the phone for hours without solution. On XX/XX/XXXX another Cust service Rep re-open my claim but now Macys/ American Express rejected my claim arguing that it is too late... 
Letter states " Why we're writing you... Thank you for your inquiry regarding the charge made at XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX in the amount of {$83.00}. 
Due to the amount of time that has elapsed since this charge was first billed, we no longer have recourse to obtain credit for this charge. 
We now consider this matter resolved and have completed our investigation. Any amount placed in dispute status has been removed. '' They are abusive, take advantages of customer like me because I am XXXX. I pay my bill on time and have a great XXXX XXXX.
